test_description: Full MCP roundtrip (initialize + list_tools + call_tool) through each sandbox runtime using echo_mcp.py

pros: Near-zero overhead (43ms)
No daemon, no images, no Docker needed
Single binary, minimal dependencies
Used by Flatpak for production app sandboxing
cons: Requires user namespace support in kernel
Need to manually bind-mount system libraries

pros: Cross-platform (Linux, macOS, Windows)
Full resource limits (memory, CPU, PIDs)
Mature, well-documented ecosystem
Pre-built images with exact dependency versions
Production-ready, battle-tested
cons: Shared kernel — kernel exploits can escape
Docker Desktop license required for commercial use on macOS/Windows

pros: Strongest self-hosted isolation without a VM
Intercepts ALL syscalls — host kernel never exposed
Also works as Docker --runtime=runsc
Used by Google Cloud Run and GKE Sandbox
cons: Not all syscalls are implemented (some programs may fail)

anthropic_srt.description: Anthropic srt (bwrap on Linux, sandbox-exec on macOS + network proxy)
pros: Cross-platform (Linux + macOS)
Network domain allowlisting (block all except specific domains)
Built by Anthropic for AI agent use cases
Uses native OS sandboxing (bwrap on Linux, sandbox-exec on macOS)

kata_containers.status: SKIP — not installed, OCI-compatible so works with Docker --runtime=kata-runtime
pros: Strongest isolation (dedicated kernel per sandbox)
OCI-compatible — works as Docker runtime, no new code needed
Used in multi-tenant cloud environments

novavm.status: FAIL — nova shell uses PTY/console, not piped stdin/stdout
novavm.incompatibility: nova shell attaches to interactive console (PTY), corrupting JSON-RPC data. MCP SDK requires clean piped stdin/stdout.

microsandbox.status: SKIP — Python SDK on PyPI but requires running microsandbox server (beta)

e2b.status: NOT IMPLEMENTED — requires new provider + E2B API key
e2b.notes: Managed service, not self-hosted. Would need SDK-level transport bridge (create_sandboxed_transport pattern). See sandbox_walkthrough.md for required code changes.

recommendation.strongest_self_hosted: gvisor — 1474ms total, user-space kernel, Linux only
recommendation.best_for_macos: anthropic_srt — 1688ms total, works on macOS without Docker
recommendation.strongest_overall: kata_containers — dedicated kernel per sandbox via KVM (OCI-compatible, works as Docker runtime)
recommendation.future_cloud: e2b — managed Firecracker VMs, needs provider implementation
